heading: Assistants to commission; expenses of commission
label: 428c Assistants to commission; expenses of commission
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to assign any officials of the Interior Department to the assistance of the commission if he deems it advisable. He is authorized to pay the reasonable expenses of the commission and their assistants incurred in the actual performance of the duties herein imposed upon them.
notes: References in TextHerein, referred to in text, means act , which is classified to sections 428 to 428d and 428e to 428i of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Mar. 26, 1928
Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 428 of this title
